promptPurpose: A 3x3 diffuse animal-surface atlas with neutral lighting, no text, no logos, no watermark, no complete animals, and species-specific fur, feather, coat, skin, and scute microdetail for the Bronx Zoo runtime meshes.
processing: Converted lossily from the generated 1254x1254 RGB PNG to WebP with cwebp quality 88; no third-party source imagery was used.
